title: Recent activity
subtitle: A live view of what this person has been watching, rating, reviewing, and finishing lately.
empty_subtitle: When new activity appears, it will show up here.

not_found.title: This account does not exist
not_found.description: We could not find a user named {{username}}. Double-check the username or try a different profile.

hidden.title: This profile is private
hidden.description: {{username}}'s profile is not publicly visible. You do not currently have permission to view it.
hidden.followers_only_title: Follow this user to unlock the profile
hidden.followers_only_description: This profile is visible only to approved followers. If the user accepts you, their activity and profile content will become visible.
hidden.followers_only_content: This person's posts and activity will appear here after you become an approved follower.
hidden.followers_only_request_title: Send a follow request to unlock the profile
hidden.followers_only_request_description: This profile is visible only to approved followers, and the user reviews follow requests manually.
hidden.followers_only_request_content: Once your request is accepted, this person's posts and activity will appear here.
hidden.followers_only_pending_description: This profile is visible only to approved followers. Your request has been sent and is waiting for a response.
hidden.followers_only_pending_content: If your request is accepted, this area will start showing this person's posts and activity.
hidden.followers_only_disabled_title: This profile is only for existing followers
hidden.followers_only_disabled_description: This user only shows their profile to approved followers and is not accepting new follow requests right now.
hidden.followers_only_disabled_content: This person's posts and activity are unavailable unless you are already an approved follower.
hidden.private_request_description: The user keeps their profile hidden. You can still send a follow request, but visibility stays under their control.
hidden.private_request_content: This person's posts and activity are intentionally hidden from other users.
hidden.private_disabled_title: This profile is private and closed
hidden.private_disabled_description: The user keeps their profile hidden and is not accepting new followers right now.
hidden.private_disabled_content: This person's posts and activity are not available.
hidden.private_content: This person's posts and activity are intentionally hidden from other users.

errors.load_profile: The profile could not be loaded.
errors.follow_action: The follow action could not be completed.
errors.load_social_list: The user list could not be loaded.
errors.block_action: The block action could not be completed.
errors.mute_action: The mute action could not be completed.

moderation.blocked_by_you_description: This profile is hidden because you blocked this user. You can unblock them anytime.
moderation.blocked_you_description: This user has blocked you, so their profile and activity are unavailable.
